About this item

  • VERY VERSATILE - Keep your home free from loose lint and hair. The ChomChom lint rollers for pet hair removal work like a charm on furniture, upholstery, blankets, and other items riddled with fur.
  • FORGET WASTEFUL REFILLS - If using endless lint roller sheets is a pet peeve, give our carpet hair remover tool a go. It doesn't require wasteful sticky tape, so you can use it again and again and ease your eco-conscience in the process.
  • NO BATTERIES REQUIRED - Forget batteries! Who needs a power source when you have our self-sufficient dog and cat hair remover? Simply roll our lint roller back and forth to trap fur into the receptacle and that's it! The power of the human hand.
  • EASY TO CLEAN - Our lint removers for clothes work with cat, dog, rabbit, horse, and even your own hair! After picking up the stray follicles, simply press down on the release button to open and empty out the waste compartment.
  • CUSTOMER SATISFACTION - Should you have questions or concerns about this pet hair remover for carpet and upholstery, our team is available to help. We want you to be purrfectly happy with your purchase!
› See more product details

From the manufacturer

Benefits at a Glance

  • Remove dog hair & cat hair easily
  • Reusable, sturdy pet hair remover tool
  • No batteries required

The ChomChom Roller is one of the World’s Best Pet Hair Remover. By simply moving the pet hair roller back and forth, you immediately track and pick up cat hairs and dog hairs embedded deeply in sofas, couches, beds, carpets, blankets, comforters and more.

You have probably tried all types of pet hair and lint removal products… from sticky roller tapes, to products that cannot be used over and over again.

With the World’s Best Pet Hair Remover, you'll never need another gadget! No adhesive or sticky tape, no power source required, clean and convenient pet hair remover. They make great gifts.

No Adhesives or Sticky Tape Required

Premium quality brush that traps pet hair. You can use it over and over again.

How to use

Step 1

Roll it back and forth in short strokes to trap the pet hair into the chamber.

Step 2

Press the handle catch to open the chamber.

Step 3

Remove all pet hair from the catchment chamber.

Step 4

Pet hair gone.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

Customers say

Customers find the pet hair remover effective at removing hair from sofas and bedding, and appreciate its ease of use, noting it's simple to empty and clean. They consider it a great tool for pet owners. Opinions on value for money are mixed, with some finding it worth the price while others feel it's not worth the cost.

Amazon Customer
5 out of 5 stars
Removing cat hairs
Jake is beginning to malt and I am fed up with his hair everywhere...I rescued him and he is as Revlon says Worth It. But ahhh hairs...This is the ONE. Previously tried Fed the sticky rollar thing, then trying to tear the piece off, or the water one. Both limited a few strokes then the next piece. This does it as long as your arm can go up and down. The hairs go into a little container so no stopping and starting. Be brill if there was a long stick version one that collects the hairs too :) Dyson too was good the animal version but annoying when it runs out sob sob This is not a waste of money. There is another i bought like a small rubber comb on here, absolute rubbish.

    Must have for pet households!
    Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 19 June 2024
    Colour Name: White
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    We have a Maine coon and being a long haired cat she leaves a lot of hair around the house. With the ChomChom we can easily clean the sofa, bed and chairs without leaving any hair behind. Really easy to use and collects all the hair inside which can be emptied hassle free. 100% recommend to anyone with pets and worth the price!

    4 out of 5 stars
    Very effective fur remover
    Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 27 June 2024
    Colour Name: White
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I've tried a lot fur removal tools, from the sticky peel away brushes, to things to add to the washing machine.

    None have been that affective, however this device has worked quite well. Whilst it doesn't remove all fur, it does remove the majority of it. Ive used it on soft furnishings, clothes, blankets etc and it has done a good job. I would recommend this for any pet owner.

    5 out of 5 stars
    Wow!
    Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 6 November 2022
    Colour Name: White
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    Genuinely didn't believe it would be as good as people were saying but I actually can't believe how good this is! We have an Akita x German Shepherd and he is currently shedding like crazy and I've been at a loss as to how to deal with it as nothing seemed to work, but given the reviews I decided to give this a try and was immediately impressed! Our dog has very thick fur and it's been shedding in clumps so I was impressed to see how well the chom chom picked it up with ease!

    So happy I no longer have to sleep on fur covered pillows 😂

    Overall, VERY happy with my purchase, it works wonders and is so easy to use!

    Photos show before and after and it literally took seconds to get it so clean of fur!

    Jake is beginning to malt and I am fed up with his hair everywhere...I rescued him and he is as Revlon says Worth It.

    Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 2 July 2024
    Colour Name: White

    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I read some very negative reviews and was prepared to send it back. But it just arrived and I gave it a wee try on my cat’s favourite cushion and it worked perfectly! No problem whatsoever, just a couple of strokes and all the hair was gone. So easy to use. 5 stars from a very happy customer!

    5 out of 5 stars
    Still my number #1 after four years
    Reviewed in Australia on 23 July 2025
    Colour Name: White
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    This thing EATS cat hair. It's the only thing that works, time and time again. I hate using single use rollers, and sticky washable ones are annoying to clean. This one works well, it's simple, it's fast, it's effective. My only complaint is that it can be tricky to use on small/cramped areas due to the size of the roller. But that negative is completely overriden by the fact that I bought this 4 years ago and it is STILL the item I reach for to get ride of cat hair

  • Helle
    5 out of 5 stars
    Je l'ai acheté en me disant que se faire arnaquer d'une vingtaine d'euros n'était pas si grave 😂
    Reviewed in France on 18 July 2024
    Colour Name: White
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    Et je me retrouve blu-ffée. Je précise que j'ai un chien à poil ras car je n'ai pas trouvé cette info au moment de l'achat : c'était un désespoir, par rapport à ma précédente chienne à poils longs, les poils se piquent dans les tissus, on en retrouve partout, sans qu'ils se regroupent en amas comme le font les poils longs.

    Alors c'est beaucoup, mais beaucoup plus efficace, rapide et moins saoulant que l'aspirateur ou les brosses collantes. C'est presque un plaisir à passer 😁.

    Du coup, il m'arrive même de la passer sur les 4 m2 de moquette que j'ai juste à côté, parce que sortir l'aspirateur quand on a un chom-chom, faut pas pousser 🤣

    Enfin, j'ai vu des conseils de bien tendre le tissu, oooof : bien sur, il ne faut pas la passer sur un tas de linge en boule, mais à mon avis, la chose qui compte le plus, c'est de faire des mouvements allers-retours, même sur un tissu peu tendu. J'ai cru que le chom-chom ne fonctionnait plus, en fait, je ne faisais, sans m'en apercevoir, plus que des allers, et ça en laissait toujours, c'est donc la clé !

    NB : ça ne retire par contre jamais les petits débris/miettes, conception à usage vraiment spécifique mais ô combien étonnante 😍

    Bref j'en rachète un pour ma résidence secondaire dès la fin de la rupture de stock. Merci à l'inventeur 😊

  • Josiane Gagnon
    5 out of 5 stars
    JUST BUY IT !!! It's one of the best purchased I've ever made.
    Reviewed in Canada on 30 December 2023
    Colour Name: White
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I think the video and pictures speak for themselves, but with 2 long hair cats who hate being brushed (meaning I can't brush away their dead undercoat), my couch is permanently covered in a thick layer of cat hair. After using this tool, it's unrecognizable! Yeah it can be a bit of a hassle to clean especially if your animals have very long hair like mine, but if you do the motion I'm doing in the video (pull-push-pull-push) most of the hair goes into the compartment and is easy to take out. On the second picture, you can easily tell where I didn't get a chance to clean the couch because the culprit in the first picture was laying there. So yeah, just buy it. Trust me you won't regret it, it works so much better than the sticky rollers and you don't throw a ton of sticky plastic sheets in the trash anymore (yay for the environment).

    Read moreRead less

Product Summary: ChomChom Pet Hair Remover - Reusable, Portable Cat and Dog Hair Remover and Scraper - Carpet Brush Hair Removal Tool - Animal Hair Lint Remover for Clothes, Furniture, Car and Bedding

From ChomChom Roller

4.4 out of 5 stars, 167,229 ratings

Customer reviews

50+ viewed in past month

Price

No featured offers available

Other sellers

Other sellers

About this Item

  • VERY VERSATILE - Keep your home free from loose lint and hair. The ChomChom lint rollers for pet hair removal work like a charm on furniture, upholstery, blankets, and other items riddled with fur.
  • FORGET WASTEFUL REFILLS - If using endless lint roller sheets is a pet peeve, give our carpet hair remover tool a go. It doesn't require wasteful sticky tape, so you can use it again and again and ease your eco-conscience in the process.
  • NO BATTERIES REQUIRED - Forget batteries! Who needs a power source when you have our self-sufficient dog and cat hair remover? Simply roll our lint roller back and forth to trap fur into the receptacle and that's it! The power of the human hand.
  • EASY TO CLEAN - Our lint removers for clothes work with cat, dog, rabbit, horse, and even your own hair! After picking up the stray follicles, simply press down on the release button to open and empty out the waste compartment.
  • CUSTOMER SATISFACTION - Should you have questions or concerns about this pet hair remover for carpet and upholstery, our team is available to help. We want you to be purrfectly happy with your purchase!

Product description

The ChomChom Roller is the World’s Best Pet Hair Remover. By simply moving the pet hair roller back and forth, you immediately track and pick up cat hairs and dog hairs embedded deeply in sofas, couches, beds, carpets, blankets, comforters and more. You have probably tried all types of pet hair and lint removal products… from sticky roller tapes, to products that cannot be used over and over again. With the World’s Best Pet Hair Remover, you'll never need another gadget! No adhesive or sticky tape, 100% reusable, no power source required, clean and convenient pet hair remover. They make great gifts!

Newer Version Available

ChomChom Roller Pet Hair Remover and Reusable Lint Roller - Cat and Dog Hair Remover for Furniture, Couch, Carpet, Clothing and Bedding - Portable, Multi-Surface Fur Removal Tool (Black)
